name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Silver Clasp 💞💞 Classic YSL legend combining fashion and romance❓ The original YSL leather texture possesses this charm. It's indescribably charming, with a magic that attracts you. A wardrobe staple for many women, it creates a simple, textured look and adds a perfect touch of flair 💋
Size: 24
Model: 1964
